globalProhibitedPatterns: \bmedical reports are processed with end[- ]to[- ]end encryption and never stored\b
\bcancel anytime from your dashboard with one click\b
\bwe do not sell, rent, or share your email with any third parties\. ever\b
\bguaranteed instant bank sync across every device\b
\b(?:koyaushe ba a san ka ba|ba a taɓa aikawa)\b

claims.approvedMeaning: Tool totals use named canonical-registry selectors and distinguish canonical records from expanded live experiences.

permittedWording.summary: Tool totals are generated from the canonical registry.

exceptions: Educational examples that do not describe AfroTools inventory.

en.summary: Tool totals are generated from the canonical registry.

fr.summary: Les totaux d'outils sont générés depuis le registre canonique.

sw.summary: Jumla za zana huzalishwa kutoka sajili rasmi ya bidhaa.

yo.summary: Àpapọ̀ irinṣẹ́ ni a ń ṣe láti inú ìforúkọsílẹ̀ pàtàkì.

ha.summary: Ana samar da jimillar kayan aiki daga rajista ta asali.

claims.approvedMeaning: Widget totals count canonical published widget records with working iframe destinations.

permittedWording.summary: Widget totals come from published widget records.

exceptions: Code examples describing a third-party widget count.

en.summary: Widget totals come from published widget records.

fr.summary: Les totaux de widgets proviennent des fiches de widgets publiées.

sw.summary: Jumla za wijeti hutokana na rekodi za wijeti zilizochapishwa.

yo.summary: Àpapọ̀ wijẹ́ẹ̀tì wá láti inú àwọn àkọsílẹ̀ tí a tẹ̀ jáde.

ha.summary: Jimillar widget tana fitowa daga bayanan widget da aka wallafa.

claims.approvedMeaning: Category totals count canonical category identifiers referenced by published tools.

permittedWording.summary: Category totals are derived from canonical category records.

exceptions: Article examples unrelated to AfroTools categories.

en.summary: Category totals are derived from canonical category records.

fr.summary: Les totaux de catégories sont dérivés des catégories canoniques.

sw.summary: Jumla za kategoria hutokana na rekodi rasmi za kategoria.

yo.summary: Àpapọ̀ ẹ̀ka wá láti inú àwọn àkọsílẹ̀ ẹ̀ka pàtàkì.

ha.summary: Jimillar rukuni tana fitowa daga bayanan rukuni na asali.

claims.approvedMeaning: Country totals count the 54 canonical African jurisdictions; regional sentinels are not countries.

permittedWording.summary: Country coverage uses the 54 canonical African jurisdictions.

exceptions: A tool can support fewer jurisdictions than the platform registry.

en.summary: Country coverage uses the 54 canonical African jurisdictions.

fr.summary: La couverture utilise les 54 juridictions africaines canoniques.

sw.summary: Ujumuishaji wa nchi hutumia mamlaka 54 rasmi za Afrika.

yo.summary: Ìborí orílẹ̀-èdè ń lo àwọn agbègbè àṣẹ Áfíríkà 54.

ha.summary: Rufin ƙasashe yana amfani da yankunan Afirka 54 na asali.

claims.approvedMeaning: Public language totals include launched/default/partial route locales only, not planned or component-only locales.

permittedWording.summary: Public language totals come from the locale manifest.

exceptions: AI component language hints do not prove public route coverage.

en.summary: Public language totals come from the locale manifest.

fr.summary: Les totaux de langues publiques proviennent du manifeste des langues.

sw.summary: Jumla za lugha za umma hutokana na manifesto ya lugha.

yo.summary: Àpapọ̀ èdè gbangba wá láti inú àkọsílẹ̀ èdè.

ha.summary: Jimillar harsunan jama'a tana fitowa daga kundin harsuna.

claims.approvedMeaning: Scholarship totals count the records in the current public scholarship feed and must retain the feed's limited, stale, or degraded state.

permittedWording.summary: Scholarship totals come from the current public feed and retain its freshness and coverage state.

exceptions: A limited or degraded feed count is not a claim about every available scholarship.

en.summary: Scholarship totals come from the current public feed and retain its freshness and coverage state.

fr.summary: Les totaux de bourses proviennent du flux public actuel et conservent son état de fraîcheur et de couverture.

sw.summary: Jumla za ufadhili hutokana na feed ya sasa ya umma na huonyesha hali yake ya upya na ujumuishaji.

yo.summary: Àpapọ̀ sikolashipu wá láti inú feed gbangba lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́, ó sì ń fi ipò tuntun àti ìborí hàn.

ha.summary: Jimillar tallafin karatu tana fitowa daga feed na jama'a na yanzu tare da matsayin sabuntawa da rufinsa.

claims.approvedMeaning: Guests can use the core inputs and results of public calculators without a paid subscription; this is not a promise that every current or future feature is permanently free.

permittedWording.summary: Core public calculators are available to guests without a paid subscription.

exceptions: API plans, Pro workspaces, higher-volume features, clean gated exports, and future features can have separate terms.

en.summary: Core public calculators are available to guests without a paid subscription.

fr.summary: Les calculatrices publiques essentielles sont accessibles sans abonnement payant.

sw.summary: Vikokotoo vya msingi vya umma vinapatikana bila usajili wa kulipia.

yo.summary: Àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìṣirò gbangba pàtàkì wà fún àlejò láìsí ìsanwó ìforúkọsílẹ̀.

ha.summary: Manyan kalkuleta na jama'a suna samuwa ba tare da biyan kuɗin rajista ba.

claims.approvedMeaning: Creating a basic account can be free, but account creation is distinct from guest use and paid Pro entitlements.

permittedWording.summary: A basic account can be created without starting a paid subscription.

exceptions: Starting a paid checkout can require payment-provider details.

en.summary: A basic account can be created without starting a paid subscription.

fr.summary: Un compte de base peut être créé sans démarrer un abonnement payant.

sw.summary: Akaunti ya msingi inaweza kufunguliwa bila kuanza usajili wa kulipia.

yo.summary: A lè dá àkọọ́lẹ̀ ìpilẹ̀ sílẹ̀ láì bẹ̀rẹ̀ ìforúkọsílẹ̀ ìsanwó.

ha.summary: Ana iya buɗe asusun asali ba tare da fara rajistar biyan kuɗi ba.

claims.approvedMeaning: Pro provides the capabilities verified by the active readiness matrix; shell and pending features remain labelled previews or pending.

permittedWording.summary: Pro access follows the current app-readiness and entitlement matrix; preview features are labelled.

exceptions: Payroll is the only fully active Pro app; other app capabilities depend on their readiness state.

en.summary: Pro access follows the current app-readiness and entitlement matrix; preview features are labelled.

fr.summary: L'accès Pro suit la matrice actuelle de disponibilité; les fonctions en aperçu sont signalées.

sw.summary: Ufikiaji wa Pro hufuata hali ya sasa ya programu; vipengele vya majaribio vinawekwa wazi.

yo.summary: Ìwọlé Pro tẹ̀lé ìmúrasílẹ̀ àwọn app; a máa samì sí àwọn ànfààní àdánwò.

ha.summary: Samun Pro yana bin matsayin shirye-shiryen app; ana bayyana fasalolin gwaji.

claims.approvedMeaning: A named local flow processes its working payload in browser memory or browser storage and does not upload that payload unless the user invokes a separately disclosed network feature.

permittedWording.summary: This local workflow processes its working data in your browser; AI, account sync, email, TTS, analytics, payments, and explicit cloud uploads are separate disclosed actions.

exceptions: AI, account sync, payments, analytics, forms/email, TTS, server-backed lookups, and explicit vault uploads use network services.

en.summary: This local workflow processes its working data in your browser; AI, account sync, email, TTS, analytics, payments, and explicit cloud uploads are separate disclosed actions.

fr.summary: Ce flux local traite ses données dans votre navigateur; l'IA, la synchronisation, l'e-mail, la synthèse vocale, l'analytique, les paiements et les envois cloud explicites sont signalés séparément.

sw.summary: Mtiririko huu wa ndani huchakata data kwenye kivinjari; AI, usawazishaji, barua pepe, TTS, uchanganuzi, malipo na upakiaji wa wingu huonyeshwa tofauti.

yo.summary: Ọ̀nà abẹ́rọ yìí ń ṣiṣẹ́ lórí data nínú aṣàwákiri; AI, sync, ímeèlì, TTS, analytics, ìsanwó àti cloud upload jẹ́ ìgbésẹ̀ míì tí a ṣàlàyé.

ha.summary: Wannan aikin na cikin na'ura yana sarrafa bayanai a burauza; AI, sync, imel, TTS, analytics, biyan kuɗi da cloud upload ana bayyana su dabam.

claims.approvedMeaning: Deterministic routing works without model consent; optional model requests go through AfroTools functions to the configured supported provider after consent and can be unavailable.

permittedWording.summary: Deterministic routing works locally; optional AI may send the disclosed prompt or selected context to AfroTools servers and the configured provider after consent.

exceptions: Provider availability depends on supported environment configuration; deterministic fallbacks remain.

en.summary: Deterministic routing works locally; optional AI may send the disclosed prompt or selected context to AfroTools servers and the configured provider after consent.

fr.summary: Le routage déterministe fonctionne localement; l'IA facultative peut envoyer le contenu indiqué aux serveurs AfroTools et au fournisseur configuré après consentement.

sw.summary: Uelekezaji wa kawaida hufanya kazi ndani; AI ya hiari inaweza kutuma maudhui yaliyoelezwa kwa seva za AfroTools na mtoa huduma baada ya idhini.

yo.summary: Ìdarí àìyípadà ṣiṣẹ́ lórí ẹrọ; AI àṣàyàn lè fi ohun tí a ṣàlàyé ránṣẹ́ sí olupin AfroTools àti olupèsè lẹ́yìn ìfọwọ́sí.

ha.summary: Tsarin zaɓi na yau da kullum yana aiki a na'ura; AI na zaɓi zai iya aika abin da aka bayyana zuwa sabar AfroTools da mai bada sabis bayan izini.

claims.approvedMeaning: Live/current wording is shown only for a successful observation with a named source, timestamp, and feature-specific live-age threshold; other states downgrade visibly.

permittedWording.summary: Data status is based on the displayed source and observation time; cached, stale, static, and unavailable states are labelled.

exceptions: Static calculator constants and fallback fixtures are not live observations.

en.summary: Data status is based on the displayed source and observation time; cached, stale, static, and unavailable states are labelled.

fr.summary: L'état des données dépend de la source et de l'heure affichées; les états en cache, périmés, statiques et indisponibles sont signalés.

sw.summary: Hali ya data hutegemea chanzo na muda unaoonyeshwa; hali ya akiba, iliyopitwa, tuli na isiyopatikana huwekwa wazi.

yo.summary: Ipò data dá lórí orísun àti àkókò tí a fi hàn; cache, stale, static àti unavailable ni a máa samì sí.

ha.summary: Matsayin bayanai yana dogara da tushe da lokacin da aka nuna; ana bayyana cached, stale, static da unavailable.

claims.approvedMeaning: Official/verified/accurate/compliant wording applies only to the named source, record, jurisdiction, period, or validated workflow—not the whole platform or an outcome.

permittedWording.summary: Source and confidence labels apply only to the named evidence, jurisdiction, period, and workflow.

exceptions: Descriptive references to an official institution do not make AfroTools official or endorsed.

en.summary: Source and confidence labels apply only to the named evidence, jurisdiction, period, and workflow.

fr.summary: Les étiquettes de source et de confiance s'appliquent uniquement aux preuves, juridictions, périodes et flux indiqués.

sw.summary: Lebo za chanzo na uhakika zinahusu ushahidi, mamlaka, kipindi na mtiririko uliotajwa pekee.

yo.summary: Àmì orísun àti ìgbọ́kànlé kan ẹ̀rí, agbègbè àṣẹ, àkókò àti iṣẹ́ tí a dárúkọ nìkan.

ha.summary: Alamar tushe da amincewa ta shafi hujja, yanki, lokaci da aikin da aka ambata kawai.

claims.approvedMeaning: Offline, 2G, page-size, load-speed, and device support claims require a reproducible measurement or compatibility fixture for the named surface.

permittedWording.summary: Compatibility and low-bandwidth statements apply only to the routes and tests named in the evidence.

exceptions: Third-party assets, live APIs, and browser capabilities can affect individual routes.

en.summary: Compatibility and low-bandwidth statements apply only to the routes and tests named in the evidence.

fr.summary: Les déclarations de compatibilité et de faible débit ne concernent que les routes et tests cités.

sw.summary: Madai ya uoanifu na intaneti hafifu yanahusu njia na majaribio yaliyotajwa pekee.

yo.summary: Ọ̀rọ̀ nípa ibámu àti nẹ́tíwọ́ọ̀kì kékeré kan àwọn ojú-ọ̀nà àti ìdánwò tí a dárúkọ nìkan.

ha.summary: Bayanin dacewa da ƙarancin intanet ya shafi hanyoyi da gwaje-gwajen da aka ambata kawai.

claims.approvedMeaning: Tax/statutory claims identify the applicable jurisdiction, tax year/effective period, source, and review state and remain planning guidance unless filing is implemented.

permittedWording.summary: Check the named jurisdiction, effective period, source, and review date before filing or paying.

exceptions: Educational examples do not establish current filing law.

en.summary: Check the named jurisdiction, effective period, source, and review date before filing or paying.

fr.summary: Vérifiez la juridiction, la période d'effet, la source et la date de révision avant toute déclaration ou paiement.

sw.summary: Thibitisha mamlaka, kipindi cha kutumika, chanzo na tarehe ya ukaguzi kabla ya kuwasilisha au kulipa.

yo.summary: Ṣàyẹ̀wò agbègbè àṣẹ, àkókò ìmúlò, orísun àti ọjọ́ àtúnyẹ̀wò kí o tó fi ẹ̀rí tàbí sanwó.

ha.summary: Duba yanki, lokacin aiki, tushe da ranar bita kafin miƙa takarda ko biyan kuɗi.

claims.approvedMeaning: Work can exist on one device; signed-in users can sync supported selected items when the authenticated workspace service succeeds.

permittedWording.summary: Selected supported items can sync to your account after sign-in when workspace sync succeeds; otherwise they remain on this device.

prohibitedAbsoluteWording: \bguaranteed instant bank sync across every device\b
exceptions: Not every local item type is supported; sign-in and a successful request are required.

en.summary: Selected supported items can sync to your account after sign-in when workspace sync succeeds; otherwise they remain on this device.

fr.summary: Les éléments pris en charge peuvent être synchronisés après connexion si le service réussit; sinon ils restent sur cet appareil.

sw.summary: Vipengele vinavyotumika vinaweza kusawazishwa baada ya kuingia ikiwa huduma inafanikiwa; vinginevyo vinabaki kwenye kifaa hiki.

yo.summary: Àwọn ohun tí a ṣe àtìlẹ́yìn fún lè sync lẹ́yìn ìwọlé bí iṣẹ́ náà bá ṣàṣeyọrí; bí bẹ́ẹ̀ kọ́, wọ́n dúró lórí ẹrọ yìí.

ha.summary: Abubuwan da ake tallafawa za su iya sync bayan shiga idan sabis ya yi nasara; in ba haka ba suna nan a wannan na'ura.

claims.approvedMeaning: AfroTools initializes checkout and reads subscription state; payment details and final transaction/cancellation confirmation are handled by the payment provider.

permittedWording.summary: Checkout and billing actions are completed by the configured payment provider; status changes require provider confirmation.

prohibitedAbsoluteWording: \bcancel anytime from your dashboard with one click\b
\bwe never have access to any payment metadata\b
exceptions: Provider availability, accepted methods, renewal, refunds, and cancellation depend on provider/account configuration.

en.summary: Checkout and billing actions are completed by the configured payment provider; status changes require provider confirmation.

fr.summary: Le paiement et la facturation sont finalisés par le prestataire configuré; tout changement d'état exige sa confirmation.

sw.summary: Malipo na bili hukamilishwa na mtoa huduma aliyesanidiwa; mabadiliko ya hali yanahitaji uthibitisho wake.

yo.summary: Olùpèsè ìsanwó tí a ṣètò ló parí checkout àti billing; ìyípadà ipò nílò ìmúdájú rẹ̀.

ha.summary: Mai bada biyan kuɗi da aka saita ne ke kammala checkout da billing; canjin matsayi yana buƙatar tabbatarwarsa.

claims.approvedMeaning: Consented analytics can send bounded product/session metadata to configured analytics processors; raw sensitive workflow content is prohibited.

permittedWording.summary: After analytics consent, bounded usage metadata may be sent to configured analytics services; raw sensitive workflow content is excluded.

exceptions: Third-party script/request metadata and provider retention remain subject to provider/browser behavior.

en.summary: After analytics consent, bounded usage metadata may be sent to configured analytics services; raw sensitive workflow content is excluded.

fr.summary: Après consentement, des métadonnées d'usage limitées peuvent être envoyées aux services d'analyse; le contenu sensible brut est exclu.

sw.summary: Baada ya idhini, metadata ndogo ya matumizi inaweza kutumwa kwa huduma za uchanganuzi; maudhui nyeti ghafi hayatumwi.

yo.summary: Lẹ́yìn ìfọwọ́sí analytics, metadata lílò tó lopin lè lọ sí iṣẹ́ analytics; a kò fi àkóónú ìkọ̀kọ̀ aise ránṣẹ́.

ha.summary: Bayan izinin analytics, ana iya aika takaitaccen metadata na amfani; ba a aika danyen bayanan sirri ba.

claims.approvedMeaning: Named local PDF/image operations use browser processing; network features such as AI, TTS, email, sync, or vault upload are separate explicit actions.

permittedWording.summary: Local document operations run in your browser; AI, TTS, email, account sync, and explicit vault uploads are separate disclosed actions.

prohibitedAbsoluteWording: \bmedical reports are processed with end[- ]to[- ]end encryption and never stored\b
\bfiles are never uploaded under any circumstances\b
exceptions: TTS, AI assistance, email delivery, account sync, and vault upload transmit selected content only after the relevant action/disclosure.

en.summary: Local document operations run in your browser; AI, TTS, email, account sync, and explicit vault uploads are separate disclosed actions.

fr.summary: Les opérations documentaires locales s'exécutent dans le navigateur; l'IA, la synthèse vocale, l'e-mail, la synchronisation et le coffre cloud sont des actions séparées.

sw.summary: Shughuli za hati za ndani hufanyika kwenye kivinjari; AI, TTS, barua pepe, usawazishaji na vault ni hatua tofauti.

yo.summary: Iṣẹ́ document abẹ́rọ ń ṣiṣẹ́ nínú aṣàwákiri; AI, TTS, ímeèlì, sync àti vault upload jẹ́ ìgbésẹ̀ ọ̀tọ̀.

ha.summary: Ayyukan takarda na cikin na'ura suna gudana a burauza; AI, TTS, imel, sync da vault upload ayyuka ne dabam.

claims.approvedMeaning: Signed-in users can explicitly upload supported files to a private configured vault when the current client/service is available; uploads and metadata can be deleted through the vault control.

permittedWording.summary: Signed-in users can explicitly upload supported files to the private account vault when the vault service is available; local downloads are separate.

prohibitedAbsoluteWording: \bfiles can never be accessed or lost\b
exceptions: The legacy browser fallback contains a non-canonical Supabase URL; wording remains conditional until corrected and reverified.

en.summary: Signed-in users can explicitly upload supported files to the private account vault when the vault service is available; local downloads are separate.

fr.summary: Les utilisateurs connectés peuvent envoyer explicitement des fichiers pris en charge vers le coffre privé lorsque le service est disponible; les téléchargements locaux sont séparés.

sw.summary: Watumiaji walioingia wanaweza kupakia faili zinazotumika kwenye vault ya akaunti ikiwa huduma inapatikana; vipakuliwa vya ndani ni tofauti.

yo.summary: Olùlò tó wọlé lè upload fáìlì tí a ṣe àtìlẹ́yìn fún sí vault àkọọ́lẹ̀ bí iṣẹ́ bá wà; download abẹ́rọ yàtọ̀.

ha.summary: Masu amfani da suka shiga za su iya upload fayilolin da ake tallafawa zuwa vault idan sabis yana samuwa; download na cikin na'ura dabam ne.

claims.approvedMeaning: Email/contact data is used for the disclosed submission or account purpose and processed by the configured form/email/account service; provider delivery and deletion timing are not guaranteed.
detectionPatterns: \bwe do not sell(?:, rent, or share)? your email\b

permittedWording.summary: Email or contact details are used for the disclosed request and processed by the configured service; unsubscribe and deletion controls depend on that workflow.

prohibitedAbsoluteWording: \bwe do not sell, rent, or share your email with any third parties\. ever\b
exceptions: Service providers necessarily process the submitted data; delivery and deletion timing can be provider-controlled.

en.summary: Email or contact details are used for the disclosed request and processed by the configured service; unsubscribe and deletion controls depend on that workflow.

fr.summary: Les coordonnées sont utilisées pour la demande indiquée et traitées par le service configuré; les contrôles de désinscription et de suppression dépendent du flux.

sw.summary: Barua pepe au mawasiliano hutumika kwa ombi lililoelezwa na kuchakatwa na huduma iliyosanidiwa; kujiondoa na kufuta hutegemea mtiririko huo.

yo.summary: Ímeèlì tàbí ìkànnì ni a lò fún ìbéèrè tí a ṣàlàyé, iṣẹ́ tí a ṣètò sì ń ṣiṣẹ́ lórí rẹ̀; unsubscribe àti deletion dá lórí iṣẹ́ náà.

ha.summary: Ana amfani da imel ko bayanan tuntuɓa don buƙatar da aka bayyana kuma sabis da aka saita yana sarrafa su; unsubscribe da goge bayanai sun dogara da aikin.
